metadata.description: Pins the original session intent, watches for long-horizon drift across /compact, and reasserts the goal when the agent diverges.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. One install pulls in all six Djinn sub-plugins via dependency resolution.

plugins.name: intent-anchor
plugins.description: Captures first-turn session intent on SessionStart; refreshes on UserPromptSubmit when new constraints appear.

plugins.name: drift-aligner
plugins.description: Per-turn intent-preservation alignment via Hunt-Szymanski LCS + Baum-Welch HMM + Vitter reservoir.

plugins.name: compact-guard
plugins.description: PreCompact hook that injects the captured intent anchor as a structural hint before the compaction model runs.

plugins.name: utterance-rank
plugins.description: On-demand PageRank analysis over the session utterance-to-artifact DAG.

plugins.name: drift-learning
plugins.description: Per-(intent-type × developer) drift-signature posterior via D5 Gauss Accumulation.

plugins.name: intent-reorient
plugins.description: Developer-facing /reorient skill for manual re-pin of the session intent mid-session. Hosts the Opus orchestrator.
